description_long: This is a modern, single-story house set within a landscaped plot featuring a mix of green lawns, palm trees, and paved walkways. The house has a flat roof and a clean, rectilinear design with large windows and a combination of white, gray, and wood-textured exterior finishes. A swimming pool is situated adjacent to the main living area, with a shaded patio and outdoor seating nearby. The property includes a driveway leading to a covered carport, and the main entrance is accentuated by a pathway lined with shrubs and decorative plants. The backyard is open and spacious, with additional greenery and a small pergola or trellis structure. The overall layout emphasizes open outdoor spaces, natural light, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, wood and white finishes, a pool, and landscaped grounds featuring palm trees and paved paths.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, carport, and a clear view of the pool and patio area.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, open lawn, and the back facade with large windows and a pergola.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the house, the pool area, and the arrangement of outdoor spaces and greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the driveway, carport, and the main entry pathway lined with palm trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide, flat pathway with steps, flanked by shrubs and palm trees, leading to a minimalist door under a modest overhang.
